text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 332 

PRE_ICL_INP_1M_COINS_TIER_09 

LABEL: Pre-ICL In-Network Pharmacy Coinsurance for 1-month Supply on Tier 9 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 1-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using an in-network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) during the 
pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D
